ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the airport was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the airport was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the airline was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the airline was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the passenger was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the passenger was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the agent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the agent was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_types" (
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim type */,
  "claim_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the claim type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the claim type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_sites" (
  "claim_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim site */,
  "claim_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the claim site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the claim site was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_site_id")
)
